name: 80W LED Rotatable Wall Pack Light AC 120-277V CCT 5000K
description: ZION LED USA 80W Rotatable LED Wall Pack Light Get bright, reliable lighting with ZION LED USA’s 80W Rotatable Wall Pack. Designed for flexibility and performance, this fixture operates on 120-277V , delivers crisp 5000K daylight , and features adjustable light modules for precise coverage in any outdoor space. Perfect For: Building Exteriors Commercial & Industrial Properties Parking Lots & Perimeter Lighting Warehouses Residential Complexes Wall Washing & Security Lighting
short_desc: Product Highlights: Rotatable Light Modules – NEMA 4×4 beam pattern per module for targeted lighting 80W Power – Also available in 40W and 120W options 5000K Color Temperature – Bright, clear daylight for better visibility Durable Build – Die-cast aluminum housing and silicone-sealed polycarbonate lens Efficient Cooling – Integrated heat sinks for long-lasting performance Easy to Install – Fits most standard junction boxes 0-10V Dimmable – Optional dimming for better energy control IP65 Rated – Waterproof and dustproof for tough outdoor conditions UL & DLC 5.1 Premium Certified 5-Year Warranty
